## What You Tried

Mention the command you already used.

Examples:

```sh
make build
./gnl_tester --root ../Get_Next_Line --quick
./gnl_tester --root ../Get_Next_Line --strict
./gnl_tester --root ../Get_Next_Line --bonus --strict
./gnl_tester --root ../Get_Next_Line --review --summary-only
```
